column1: # mapping_set_title: Kobo Record 136 to Schema.org Dataset Mapping
# mapping_set_description: SSSOM mapping from KoboToolbox record 136 raw JSON to Gaia Catalog JSON-LD.

column13: comment

Each Kobo submission becomes one Schema.org Dataset. Emit @id from etl_group/table_name as https://gdsc.idsc.miami.edu/detail/{table_name}. Extend @context with qudt, xsd, pato and set @language to en.
Kobo title is the Schema.org Dataset name.
Dataset abstract or description.
Emit {"@type":"PropertyValue","propertyID":"https://registry.identifiers.org/registry/doi","value":"doi:{value}","url":"https://doi.org/{value}"}.
Dataset landing page URL.
Map known Kobo license codes to full URIs: cc_by→https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/, cc0→https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/, etc.
Language code.
Publication date.
Last data update.
Map creator_name→Organization.name, creator_affiliation→Organization description; wrap each in a Role object with roleName=creator.
Map publisher_name→Organization.name; resolve known institutions to ROR @id (University of Miami GDSC→https://ror.org/02y3ad647).
Map coverage_name→Place.name; build additionalProperty with GeoNames link from coverage_identifier and coverage_identifier_schema_uri. Bounding box geo.box must be supplied externally.
Subject terms are discoverability keywords.
Split on space; each token becomes a DataCatalog with @id=https://gdsc.idsc.miami.edu/?collection={token}. Always prepend root GDSC DataCatalog entry (https://gdsc.idsc.miami.edu).
Emit DefinedTerm with termCode=value (vector/table/raster); inDefinedTermSet pointing to GDSC dataRepresentation vocab.
Emit DefinedTerm with termCode=value (polygon, point, etc.); inDefinedTermSet pointing to GDSC vector geometry vocab.
Append to spatialCoverage.additionalProperty as PropertyValue with name=Spatial Reference System and full OGC SRS URI as value.
Emit {"@type":"DataDownload","name":"Source distribution","contentUrl":value}; merge with format and extension mappings.
Gaia/PostGIS table name is operational metadata.
zip should become application/zip or remain as source extension.
shp describes the source data format.
Update frequency maps to Dublin Core accrual periodicity.

Map attribute_name→name, attribute_description→description, attribute_type→qudt:dataType (integer→xsd:integer, string→xsd:string, numeric→xsd:float), attribute_unit→unitText, attribute_unit_concept_id→unitCode lookup, attribute_start_date+attribute_end_date→additionalProperty temporal_interval, attribute_concept_id→alternateName.
Derive ISO 8601 interval string (min start_date/max end_date) across all attribute temporal metadata fields.
If rights URI contains creativecommons.org or license code is cc_by/cc0, emit boolean true.
